paper_title: Teacher appraisal and student feedback on teacher professional development and practices

entities.description: The process of improving and increasing capabilities of staff through access to education and training opportunities.
A system for evaluating the performance and responsibilities of teachers to improve motivation and effectiveness.
Information provided by students regarding their learning experience and teacher performance.
A research approach that combines both qualitative and quantitative data collection and analysis.
Research instrument consisting of a series of questions for gathering information from respondents.
Qualitative research technique involving direct conversation for in-depth data collection.
A sampling technique where each member of the population has an equal chance of being selected.
Software used for data processing and computerized analysis.
Statistical methods used to summarize and describe the features of a dataset.
The digital data collected from 100 students and various teachers during the study.
Reliability coefficient of the research instrument.
The percentage of interviewed teachers wanting to receive appraisal.
The percentage of students and teachers agreeing feedback is a tool for development.
